_comment: SSOT for the GitHub repo About (sidebar description + topics). NOT read by GitHub directly — projected onto the repo by scripts/sync-about.sh (owner-run, --live), verified weekly by .github/workflows/about-drift.yml, and its leading skill count is checked against the tree by scripts/check-versions.sh. Edit here when the skill/discipline/gate counts change; the description MUST start with the current skill count so check-versions can parse it.
description: 103 marketing skills + 7 commands for Claude Code & AI agents across 6 disciplines — SEO/GEO, influencer, paid ads, email, product launch & organic social — on one shared contract, with 7 auditor gates: CORE-EEAT · CITE · C³ · ROAS · SEND · RAMP · ECHO.
